title: Why Peptides Are Under Attack w/ Brigham Buhler

chunks.title: Introduction to Health and Nutrition Issues
chunks.summary: The conversation begins with a discussion about the current state of the American diet and lifestyle, highlighting the need for changes to prevent diseases like Alzheimer's. The presenters emphasize the importance of gut health in overall wellness.
chunks.transcript: We know our food is not good. We know the average American diet, lifestyle, nutrition, exercise, all of those things. We've got to fix Alzheimer's, your biggest risk factor is your gut bio, right? These are the levers that we have to make America a healthy country.

chunks.title: Pharmaceutical Industry Critique
chunks.summary: A critical view of the pharmaceutical industry is presented, focusing on how it influences the FDA and stifles innovation around treatments like peptides and stem cells. The discussion includes concerns about the prioritization of profit over patient health.
